summary: Phase 4 Media Upload feature testing completed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All MediaUploader features verified working.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend API: POST /api/upload/{listing_id} accepts JPEG images
✅ Backend API: POST /api/upload/{listing_id} accepts PNG images
✅ Backend API: POST /api/upload/{listing_id} accepts WebP images
✅ Backend API: POST /api/upload/{listing_id} rejects GIF format (400 error)
✅ Backend API: POST /api/upload/{listing_id} rejects images >5MB (400 error)
✅ Backend API: POST /api/upload/{listing_id} rejects unsupported formats (BMP, etc)
✅ Backend API: POST /api/upload/{listing_id} requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend API: POST /api/upload/{listing_id} rejects nonexistent listing (404)
✅ Backend API: PUT /api/media/{listing_id}/cover/{media_id} sets cover photo
✅ Backend API: PUT /api/media/{listing_id}/cover/{media_id} requires auth (401)
✅ Backend API: PUT /api/media/{listing_id}/reorder reorders media list
✅ Backend API: PUT /api/media/{listing_id}/reorder requires auth (401)
✅ Backend API: DELETE /api/media/{listing_id}/{media_id} deletes media
✅ Backend API: DELETE /api/media/{listing_id}/{media_id} requires auth (401)
✅ Backend API: Image limit (20) enforced in backend code
✅ Backend API: Video limit (2) enforced in backend code
✅ Backend API: Video content types (mp4, webm, quicktime) accepted
✅ Backend API: GET /api/listings/{id} returns media array with correct structure
✅ Frontend: Escort dashboard renders with Create Listing button
✅ Frontend: Escort login redirects to dashboard showing listings and stats
✅ Frontend: Listing creation dialog shows 'Save first' message for media upload
✅ Frontend: Edit listing dialog shows MediaUploader component
✅ Frontend: MediaUploader shows drag & drop zone with file type hints (JPG/PNG/WebP 5MB, MP4/WebM 50MB)
✅ Frontend: MediaUploader shows photo/video count indicators (X/20 photos, X/2 videos)
✅ Frontend: MediaUploader shows media grid with thumbnails
✅ Frontend: MediaUploader shows COVER badge on cover image
✅ Frontend: ListingDetailPage renders correctly with gallery and thumbnails
✅ Frontend: Homepage renders correctly with all listings
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Test uploads created test media files which were then deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Media upload features all working. Age gate bypass: click 'I am 18+ — Enter' button. MediaUploader component appears inside listing edit dialog. New listings require save before media upload. S3 storage via emergentstorage is REAL - uploads go to actual storage. Login selectors: data-testid='login-email-input', data-testid='login-password-input', data-testid='login-submit-btn'.

phase_4_features_summary.file_validation: Working - enforces file types (jpg/png/webp/mp4/webm) and size limits (5MB images, 50MB videos)
phase_4_features_summary.media_limits: Working - max 20 images, max 2 videos per listing
phase_4_features_summary.media_uploader_ui: Working - drag & drop, progress indicators, thumbnails, cover badge
phase_4_features_summary.video_support: Working - video player in ListingDetailPage for video media items

notes: Video upload test uses small fake data - actual video upload may need larger real video files
Image auto-resize to 1920px implemented in frontend MediaUploader component
Console shows 404 errors for /api/api/premium-packages - duplicate /api prefix, but doesn't affect functionality
